name: OudsControlBackgroundModifier
desc: A class that provides the background color for the OudsCheckbox/OudsRadioButton/OudsSwitch based on its state.

name: getBackgroundColor
desc: Gets the background color based on the control state.

name: getBackgroundItemColor
desc: Gets the background color based on the control state.

name: OudsControlBorderModifier
desc: A class that provides the border color for the OudsCheckbox/OudsRadioButton/OudsSwitch based on its state and error status.

name: getBorderColor
desc: Gets the border color based on the checkbox state and error status.

name: getBorderRadius
desc: Gets the border radius based on the checkbox.

name: getBorderWidth
desc: Gets the border width based on the checkbox state.

name: OudsControlItem
desc:
Refactor of controls for Checkbox, Switch, and RadioButton.
This implementation provides a customizable control item with properties such as text, icon, and interaction states.
It manages its own interaction state and can respond to tap events if not in read-only mode.

name: OudsInheritedInteractionModel
desc:
A model for sharing interaction states between parent and child widgets
in the OUDS (Orange Unified Design System) framework.

name: updateShouldNotify
desc: Whether the framework should notify widgets that inherit from this widget.

name: updateShouldNotifyDependent
desc:
Return true if the changes between this model and oldWidget match any
of the dependencies.

name: OudsInteractionStateController
desc:
The OudsInteractionStateController class is a controller that manages the interaction states
of UI components in a Flutter application. It uses the GetX package for state management.
